overview: Ice Kobold Axeman is a Normal-class Humanoid/Beast monster found in Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 24 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage:  at 150% ratio (360 base damage). Sight range 800, combat radius 130. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Sheild.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Light (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Sheild
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Sheild. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 800 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 800 units, loses target at 1200 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 130, ability check distance 180
strategies.description: Combat area radius 130. Ability check distance 180. Ability attack delay: 0.4s.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 800 units. Loses target at 1200 units.
